entry.summary:
Author: Sivan325

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,287Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

entry.title: The Ghost of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: pixieblade

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,668Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Mieczysław Stilinski stepped out of the transport ship with the air of someone who had seen everything and could have cared less about most of it. He was here to observe. To learn how the rest of the Galactic Syndicate Members trained their soldiers, advisors, and researchers. His father had been specific in his instructions: keep your eyes and ears open and your mouth shut. Keep the darkness contained and no matter what, never let them know what you are.

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,726Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.title: Am I Not Attractive To Gay Guys?
entry.summary:
Author: AnachronisticFruit

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,481Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Ever since Danny came out in seventh grade, Stiles was constantly asking him if he found Stiles attractive. Well, no, not exactly, he would ask "am I attractive to gay gays?" or "do gay guys find me attractive?".Danny always just ignored him. He wasn't just there to be some straight guy's ego boost. Even though he was kinda cute. He was very much a twink, and Danny knew plenty of gay guys who would definitely be attracted to Stiles. And, yeah, sure, gay guys aren't a monolith, yada yada, but an hour down at The Jungle and Stiles would find just how attractive gay guys found him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,059Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 36

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Latibule
entry.summary:
Author: Deanslefttoe

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,567Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 118

Summary: **new chapter coming soon** Latibule: (noun.) A hiding place; a place or person of safety and comfort Stiles is at college, in his second year of study, trying to navigate being a broke student, being away from his home town, and being kicked out of his pack.Stiles is prepared, feeling less off balance than his previous year at college, he's excited, even, ready to get through as much as possible. And, he is almost over the guilt and shame and heartbreak that came with the whole getting kicked out of his pack thing. Yes, he still has a crush on Derek, but he has had a crush on Derek since he was 16, and now at 21, he's pretty sure he can manage.What happens when Stiles's new Folklore & Anthropology professor turns out to be Derek Hale, the one who kicked him from the pack 2 years earlier? What happens when Stiles is so utterly convinced that Derek hates him that he can't read between the lines of what the werewolf is trying to tell him?Read to find out ;)

entry.title: Pup cups & curly fries
entry.summary:
Author: punk2

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,032Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 44

Summary: “Stiles…” “Yeah, buddy?” he says through a mouthful.There’s a crinkle followed by silence, and he raises his head to glance over at where Derek is standing, still not far from the door. The man pulls a little plastic container close to his nose and hesitantly sniffs it. Stiles almost wishes he’d thought to film this glorious moment, but he actually values his life. Somewhat. Not enough to not do this, but enough to not film it.“Is this-... Why is there whipped cream in here?” To be fair, Stiles did also get him a double whatever-kind-of burger, with bacon! So he can’t be too mad, can he? Stiles really hopes not, because he can’t help snorting so hard he almost chokes on a fry. Finally, he clears his throat and says, “It’s a pup cup!”Silence. “Because… Because you’re uh…” “I highly suggest you do not finish that sentence. Not if you value your arms”. “M-my arms?”“Because I will break them”. “Yep. Uh-huh, yeah no, that’s… yep. You got it. Shutting up!” ---In which everything is basically just crack, because it's Stiles. And I mean... Yeah, that should tell you enough.

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,869Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 129

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: He can't be dead
entry.summary:
Author: dromlex

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,549Chapters: 1/20Kudos: 8

Summary: After Derek Hale's death, Eli calls Stiles Stilinski. He doesn't remember his face, but he knows his name from the countless stories he's heard throughout his life. Stiles returns to Beacon Hills with a secret. A secret that, when the grief becomes too much, will bring Derek Hale back to life.

entry.title: All Hale Caffeine - Book 2
entry.summary:
Author: Molly_Is_A_Fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,891Chapters: 5/18Kudos: 76

Summary: Kate Argent is dead. Victoria Argent is locked up for life. But Gerard's out on the prowl, bloodthirsty for revenge and there is a Kanima running around town killing people, seemingly at random. With the help of the magic councils, can Chris and Allison trick Gerard into defeat? More importantly, will Chris be able to move past what he's done?While the pack races to figure out who the Kanima is and Stiles attempts to control his ever-growing magic, Gerard Argent looms closer and closer, threatening to unravel the pack and the happiness they have found. Coffee Shop AU Rewrite of Season 2. Please read Book 1 first, to understand what is going on.

entry.title: In which the Protagonists are stupid
entry.summary:
Author: ani_18907

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,642Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Thomas didn‘t know what he expected to see but not a whole room covered in white. Everything was white. The bed, the sheets, the walls, the ceiling. Hell, even he himself was white. He could use some sunlight.He looked around the room. Another bed but empty. A small closet next to the window. A chair, another chair and another chair with a sleeping boy on it.Wait.Why did this boy seem like someone he should recognize? It took Thomas one, two, three seconds to puzzle the picture together.And then he let out a scream, high pitched because his voice wasn‘t in use for some time. It sounded raspy and barely like his own voice but Thomas felt the vibrations in his neck so he was sure he was the one screaming. Or: Thomas and Stiles are twins and Thomas wakes up in Beacon Hills after everything that WCKD has done to him. While trying to navigate in his new life he finally has time to understand some of his feelings. And maybe he can help his twin with his own. But when their grandparents suddenly come to visit everything becomes to much.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,764Chapters: 9/75Kudos: 12

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,437Chapters: 9/39Kudos: 67

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,284Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 34

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,650Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 1,178

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.
